/usr/bin/ar qc libSource.a CMakeFiles/Source.dir/actor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/area.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/block.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/blockFeature.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/body.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/caveIn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/construct.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/craft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/cuboid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/dig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/drainQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/drink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/eat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/eqipment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/eventSchedule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/farmFields.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/fight.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/fillQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/fire.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/fluidGroup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/fluidQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/getIntoAttackPosition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/givePlantsFluid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/grow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/harvest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/hasShape.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/haul.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/item.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/leadAndFollow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/locationBuckets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/mistDisperseEvent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/move.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/moveEvent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/objective.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/plant.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/project.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/routeRequest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/simulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/sleep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/sowSeeds.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/stockpile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/temperatureSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/threadedTask.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/visionCuboid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Source.dir/visionRequest.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libSource.a
